svg.text: CONFIDENTIAL · FOR DOĞUŞ OTOMOTİV LEADERSHIP REVIEW

svg.text: A 12-month transformation blueprint for the multi-brand contact center
Volkswagen · Audi · Škoda · SEAT · Porsche · Bentley · Lamborghini

text.font-family: 'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif
'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif
'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif

svg.text: Scope, baseline, and the one-line thesis we are testing.

text.font-family: 'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif

svg.text: A specialized voice agent layered on top of the existing

text.font-family: 'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif

svg.text: contact center can absorb 70% of inbound volume in 12 months,

text.font-family: 'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif

svg.text: while lifting service-channel revenue by 22% via outbound automation,

text.font-family: 'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif

svg.text: at a 45% lower cost-to-serve and without dealer disruption.
Average inbound handle time, all intents

text.font-family: 'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif
'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif
'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif

svg.text: Single horizontal flow from caller to outcome, with the AI tier sitting between the IVR and the dealer DMS.

text.font-family: 'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif

svg.text: If confidence < 70% or sentiment < 0.2 → escalate to live agent

text.font-family: 'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif

svg.text: If KVKK consent missing → route to scripted IVR with operator-only path

text.font-family: 'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif

svg.text: If brand = Porsche / Bentley / Lamborghini → premium voice profile + dedicated queue

'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif
'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif

svg.text: Ten specialized agents. Each owns one intent, end to end.

text.font-family: 'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif
'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif
'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif

svg.text: Twelve months. Each phase carries a quantified gate before the next opens.
Compliance sign-off, mock-API ready, 100 reference calls captured
Containment ≥ 60% on Service Appointment, CSAT ≥ 4.0, zero P0 incidents
WER < 8% sustained, 4 brands live, dealer council unblocking changes
Cost-to-serve −30%, NPS uplift +10, Porsche queue accepted by brand owner

text.font-family: 'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif
'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif
'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif

svg.text: What we measure, where we read it, and what good looks like at month 12.
% inbound calls resolved end-to-end by AI
Mean inbound call duration, all intents
p50 service availability across calendar year
Fully-loaded cost per resolved customer interaction
Service-channel revenue lift attributable to outbound bot
% of eligible base contacted within campaign window

text.font-family: 'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif
'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif
'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif

svg.text: Who is Responsible, Accountable, Consulted, Informed. RACI without ambiguity.
Adding a new agent / use case
Changing a workflow prompt in production
Releasing to a new dealer or new brand
Killing the AI on a single line (kill-switch)

text.font-family: 'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif
'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif
'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif

svg.text: What can break, how likely, what we do about it. Reviewed weekly.
Standardize on top 3 DMS profiles, build adapters; manual fallback for tail
Turkish-language quality drifts at the edge
Continuous fine-tune on captured calls; weekly WER monitoring with alerts
Legal opinion week 1; opt-in capture in IVR; data residency in TR region
Continuous batching, autoscale on H100/H200, queue with ETA broadcasted
Champion dealers in council, monthly wins published, opt-in per dealer
OEM compliance gap on recall execution
Per-call audit trail, weekly OEM reporting, exception escalation in 24h
Dedicated voice profile, shorter scripts, premium dialer pool
Tool-calling for any quote; LLM reads from system, never composes numerals

text.font-family: 'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif
'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif
'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif

svg.text: What must hold for the plan to land. If any breaks, the schedule re-baselines.

text.font-family: 'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif

svg.text: API access to SAP CRM and the three highest-volume Dealer DMS instances is in place by week 2.

text.font-family: 'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif

svg.text: Existing Cisco UCM admits SIP egress to a Freya endpoint without disrupting the legacy IVR.

text.font-family: 'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif

svg.text: Doğuş Compliance issues a written opinion on voice biometrics and KVKK consent before pilot launch.

text.font-family: 'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif

svg.text: A pilot cohort of three dealerships (one VW, one Audi, one Škoda) commits to be primary references.

text.font-family: 'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif

svg.text: Freya is permitted to retain de-identified call audio for fine-tuning, separate from PII storage.

text.font-family: 'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif

svg.text: Brand owners (Porsche, Bentley, Lamborghini) accept a separate premium voice profile by month 9.

text.font-family: 'Source Serif Pro', 'EB Garamond', 'Georgia', 'Times New Roman', serif

svg.text: Annual call volume forecast (12.4M inbound) does not change by more than ±15% during the engagement.
